package rulecoverage

func PositiveUpstreamHttpCallPerItemInHandlerLoop() string {
    ruleID := "upstream_http_call_per_item_in_handler_loop"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Upstream HTTP calls made per item inside handler loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
